verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve had bad days and I’ve had hills to climb. I’ve had sad days and then a weary mile. Yet when I look about and think these things all out All of the good things outweigh the bad ones. I can’t complain.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is so good to me. He is so good to me. More than this world could be. He’s so good to me. His spirit came to me and gave me victory. God is so good to me, I can’t complain.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes the clouds hang low. I’d like to see them go. I ask the question, Lord. Why so much pain But He knows what’s best for me, Although I cannot see, So I just say thank you, Lord. I can’t complain.
